name: Fried Eggplant
method: Peel and cut eggplant into thin slices. If you like to leave the outside peel on you can skip peeling it. Place in a colander and sprinkle with salt. Leave in the sink for about 30 minutes. Rinse eggplant well and pat dry.

In a small bowl combine olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and salt & pepper, you can add more or less. Coat eggplant slices in balsamic vinegar mixture and lay flat on a parchment-lined baking sheet. Pour any remainder over top. Bake at 350° F until tender, about 15 minutes. Serves 2-3. Garnish with basil leaves and a drizzle of olive oil and balsamic vinegar. Olé
